detail.description:
[Epic Battle Royale Masterpiece] There are so many activities waiting for you to play.
Get to the top in PUBG MOBILE and fire it up. PUBG MOBILE is the original battle royale mobile game and the pinnacle of mobile shooting games.

[Extreme Firefight, 10 Minutes to Fight] Prepare your firearms, respond to PUBG MOBILE’s battle call, and fight freely in the battle.
